description: Conduct an initial broad search to identify the standard phases of a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA).
completion_summary: Conducted initial broad searches for DPIA phases. Results did not yield direct, authoritative descriptions of DPIA phases; identified a gap in available document corpus.

description: Extract and summarize the key phases of a DPIA from authoritative sources (e.g., GDPR guidelines, regulatory bodies, reputable privacy organizations).
completion_summary: Extracted and summarized available information. No explicit DPIA phase descriptions found in the corpus; noted gap and lack of authoritative guidance.

description: Cite sources for each identified phase and provide brief explanations for each phase.
completion_summary: Cited gap findings for each phase; no direct DPIA phase explanations available in the corpus. Provided explanations regarding the lack of source material.
